data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: Adobe utilizes a microservices architecture to enhance scalability and maintainability of its platform.

data.title: Cloud-Based Infrastructure
data.description: The site is hosted on cloud-based services to ensure high availability and performance.

data.title: Content Delivery Network (CDN)
data.description: Adobe employs a CDN to deliver content efficiently across global regions.

data.title: Load Balancing
data.description: A load balancing mechanism is in place to distribute incoming traffic and prevent server overload.

data.title: Data Redundancy and Backup
data.description: Data redundancy strategies are implemented to ensure data preservation and integrity.
